name: Trout Stuffed Japanese Style
recipeIngredient: 4 Trout, 8-10 oz. boned with skin, head and tail
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the vegetables together.
2. In a large skillet or wok, heat oil over medium heat.
3. Toss in the vegetables and stir fry for 2 minutes until they are lightly browned.
4. Add the eggs and soy sauce to the skillet; continue tossing and cooking for another minute until the eggs begin to coagulate.
5. Stuff each of the trout with one-fourth of the vegetable mixture, allowing the filling to expand the opening by about an inch.
6. Wrap 2 slices of bacon around each trout, tucking the ends under the fish.
7. Place the prepared trout in a large baking dish so they are not touching and cover with foil.
8. Bake at 500 degrees Fahrenheit for approximately 15 minutes, until the skin is crisp and the fish is opaque to the bone. Test after 12 minutes. Vegetables will remain crisp.
